meta.title: A new enzyme-linked fluorescence assay (ELFA) for use with peroxidase-antibody conjugates: a comparison with ELISA for the quantitation of IgM antibodies to hepatitis B core antigen

abstractHtml: A new enzyme-linked fluorescence assay (ELFA) suitable for use with peroxidase-antibody conjugates is described. The substrate for the assay is p-hydroxyphenylacetic acid, the fluorescent product of which is stable and unaffected by light. The assay compared favourably with a standard ELISA for the quantitation of IgM antibodies to hepatitis B core antigen.
affiliationsHtml: • Departments of Microbiology, Brompton Hospital and Cardiothoracic Institute, Fulham Road, London SW3 6HP
